title: Hosted Multi-Finalist Validation Foundation
description: Convert the Sprint 24 hosting shortlist and explicit human direction into one deterministic, TEST-only multi-finalist validation program with fail-closed capability gates and no production authority.
acceptance_criteria: An explicit human hosting-direction decision authorizes validation of multiple finalists without selecting a production architecture
CF-NATIVE, CF-NEON-R2, and GCP-NEON-R2 are governed by one comparable ordered validation contract
The validation program is TEST-only, permits no production data or production credentials, and cannot create production approval
Every finalist must exercise the complete boundary set for namespace, tenant, subject, domain, audience, and execution context
Every finalist retains all seven unresolved Sprint 23 production prerequisites without manufacturing validation claims
Hosted execution fails closed unless provider TEST identity, provider TEST credentials, and teardown authority are available
Focused automated tests cover finalist completeness, phase completeness, boundary completeness, unresolved prerequisites, invalid finalist rejection, capability denial, and readiness

evidence.description: Implemented the multi-finalist hosting direction, TEST-only validation contract, executable capability gates, review package, and focused tests.
Merged the Sprint 25 hosted validation foundation into sandbox.
CI passed the complete test suite for the Sprint 25 implementation.
Runtime Coverage passed with the new hosting validation paths.
Work Control Authority passed on the isolated implementation change set.
